mapper.insert: INSERT INTO debt_installment (user_id, account_id, debt_id, period, due_date, principal, interest, amount, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountId}, #{debtId}, #{period}, #{dueDate}, #{principal}, #{interest}, #{amount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, account_id, debt_id, period, due_date, principal, interest, amount, status FROM debt_installment WHERE debt_id = #{debtId} ORDER BY period ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE debt_installment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM debt_installment WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (0, 2)
